---
title: "explore_lowseq_results"
---


# Loading data and libraries
```{r}
# Alleloscope is installed at a non-default library path
.libPaths(c("/projectnb/paxlab/presh/Rlibs/4.5", .libPaths()))

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Alleloscope)
  library(Matrix)
  library(parallel)
})

NCORES <- as.integer(Sys.getenv("NSLOTS", "2"))

allelo.path <- "/projectnb/paxlab/presh/software/Alleloscope"
data.path   <- "/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/alleloscope/lowseq"
dir_path    <- file.path(data.path, "output")
dir.create(dir_path, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

message(sprintf("[%s] === Alleloscope lowseq analysis START (ncores=%d) ===",
                Sys.time(), NCORES))

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# CHECKPOINT RESUME: load latest available saved state and skip completed steps
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CKPT_SEG     <- file.path(dir_path, "rds", "Obj_after_seg.rds")
CKPT_EM_SEG  <- file.path(dir_path, "rds", "Obj_after_EM_seg.rds")
CKPT_SEL_NRM <- file.path(dir_path, "rds", "Obj_after_select_normal.rds")
CKPT_GTV     <- file.path(dir_path, "rds", "Obj_after_gtv.rds")

# Always load raw_counts + size (small, needed by downstream steps)
# Determine from which step to resume
if (file.exists(CKPT_GTV)) {
  message(sprintf("[%s] [resume] Loading checkpoint: Obj_after_gtv.rds (resuming from Step 9)", Sys.time()))
  size <- read.table(file.path(allelo.path, "data-raw/sizes.cellranger-GRCh38-1.0.0.txt"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)[1:22, ]
  raw_counts <- read.table(file.path(data.path, "chr1000k_fragments.tsv"), sep = "\t", header = TRUE, row.names = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  colnames(raw_counts) <- gsub("[.]", "-", colnames(raw_counts))
  Obj_filtered <- readRDS(CKPT_GTV)
  RESUME_FROM <- 9L
} else if (file.exists(CKPT_SEL_NRM)) {
  message(sprintf("[%s] [resume] Loading checkpoint: Obj_after_select_normal.rds (resuming from Step 8)", Sys.time()))
  size <- read.table(file.path(allelo.path, "data-raw/sizes.cellranger-GRCh38-1.0.0.txt"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)[1:22, ]
  raw_counts <- read.table(file.path(data.path, "chr1000k_fragments.tsv"), sep = "\t", header = TRUE, row.names = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  colnames(raw_counts) <- gsub("[.]", "-", colnames(raw_counts))
  Obj_filtered <- readRDS(CKPT_SEL_NRM)
  RESUME_FROM <- 8L
} else if (file.exists(CKPT_EM_SEG)) {
  message(sprintf("[%s] [resume] Loading checkpoint: Obj_after_EM_seg.rds (resuming from Step 7)", Sys.time()))
  size <- read.table(file.path(allelo.path, "data-raw/sizes.cellranger-GRCh38-1.0.0.txt"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)[1:22, ]
  raw_counts <- read.table(file.path(data.path, "chr1000k_fragments.tsv"), sep = "\t", header = TRUE, row.names = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  colnames(raw_counts) <- gsub("[.]", "-", colnames(raw_counts))
  Obj_filtered <- readRDS(CKPT_EM_SEG)
  RESUME_FROM <- 7L
} else if (file.exists(CKPT_SEG)) {
  message(sprintf("[%s] [resume] Loading checkpoint: Obj_after_seg.rds (resuming from Step 6)", Sys.time()))
  size <- read.table(file.path(allelo.path, "data-raw/sizes.cellranger-GRCh38-1.0.0.txt"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)[1:22, ]
  raw_counts <- read.table(file.path(data.path, "chr1000k_fragments.tsv"), sep = "\t", header = TRUE, row.names = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  colnames(raw_counts) <- gsub("[.]", "-", colnames(raw_counts))
  Obj_filtered <- readRDS(CKPT_SEG)
  RESUME_FROM <- 6L
} else {
  RESUME_FROM <- 1L
}

if (RESUME_FROM > 1L) {
  message(sprintf("[%s] Skipping Steps 1-%d (already completed)", Sys.time(), RESUME_FROM - 1L))
}

```




# 1. Making custom heatmap with Clusters_tile information 
```{r}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Making my own heatmap 
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Step 1 - getting metadata 
project_root <- "/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac"

# 1) Tissue barcode lists
bc_488 <- unique(readLines(file.path(project_root, "Data/alleloscope/barcodes/deepseq_488B.barcodes.tsv")))
bc_489 <- unique(readLines(file.path(project_root, "Data/alleloscope/barcodes/deepseq_489.barcodes.tsv")))
bc_488 <- bc_488[nzchar(bc_488)]
bc_489 <- bc_489[nzchar(bc_489)]

# Optional: ensure no overlap
bc_489 <- setdiff(bc_489, bc_488)

# 2) Cluster source (Clusters_tile from ArchR metadata)
meta <- read.table(
  file.path(project_root, "Data/archr_metadata.tsv"),
  header = TRUE,
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# First column in this file is the cell id like Deepseq#BARCODE-1
cell_id <- rownames(meta)
barcode <- sub("-1$", "", sub("^Deepseq#", "", cell_id))

# Map barcode -> tile cluster
cluster_map <- setNames(meta$Clusters_tile, barcode)

# 3) Build requested dataframe
df_488 <- data.frame(
  barcode = bc_488,
  tissue = "488B",
  Clusters_tile = unname(cluster_map[bc_488]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

df_489 <- data.frame(
  barcode = bc_489,
  tissue = "489",
  Clusters_tile = "no",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

annot_df <- rbind(df_488, df_489)
rownames(annot_df) <- NULL

# Optional: if any 488B barcodes are missing in cluster_map, set to "no"
annot_df$Clusters_tile[is.na(annot_df$Clusters_tile)] <- "no"

# Final columns are exactly: barcode, tissue, Clusters_tile
head(annot_df)
table(annot_df$tissue, annot_df$Clusters_tile, useNA = "ifany")



# Step 2 - editing the function   
#' CNV heatmap with custom row annotations (tissue + cluster labels)
#'
#' Wraps \code{plot_scATAC_cnv} logic but accepts a structured \code{annotation_df}
#' with per-cell metadata columns (e.g. \code{tissue}, \code{Clusters_tile}) and
#' supports displaying the plot interactively or saving to a file.
#'
#' @param raw_mat Binned coverage matrix (bins x cells).
#' @param cell_type Data frame with columns: barcode (col1), cell type label (col2).
#' @param normal_lab Character(s) indicating normal cell type labels.
#' @param size Chromosome size table (chr, size).
#' @param window_w Window width for signal smoothing (bp).
#' @param window_step Step size for signal smoothing (bp).
#' @param nclust Number of row clusters for heatmap.
#' @param var.filter Logical. Whether to filter highly variable bins.
#' @param annotation_df Data frame with rownames = cell barcodes. Columns are
#'   appended as row annotations in the heatmap. Recommended columns:
#'   \code{tissue} (e.g. "488B", "489") and \code{Clusters_tile} (ArchR cluster
#'   label for 488B cells, "no" for others).
#' @param annotation_colors Named list of colour vectors for each annotation
#'   column passed to pheatmap. NULL = auto.
#' @param plot_path Path to save the plot (PNG or PDF detected by extension).
#'   Ignored when \code{display = TRUE}.
#' @param display Logical. If TRUE, render to the active graphics device
#'   (RStudio viewer) instead of saving. Overrides \code{plot_path}.
#' @param width  Width in pixels (PNG) or inches (PDF). Default 800.
#' @param height Height in pixels (PNG) or inches (PDF). Default 450.
#'
#' @return Invisibly: list of \code{clust_order}, \code{plot_matrix},
#'   \code{annotation_row}.
#' @import matrixStats
#' @export
plot_scATAC_cnv_custom <- function(
    raw_mat = NULL,
    cell_type = NULL,
    normal_lab = "normal",
    size = NULL,
    window_w = 10000000,
    window_step = 2000000,
    plot_path = NULL,
    display = FALSE,
    width = 1400,
    height = 700,
    res = 150,
    nclust = 3,
    var.filter = FALSE,
    annotation_df = NULL,
    annotation_colors = NULL
) {
  # ----------------------------
  # Input checks
  # ----------------------------
  if (is.null(raw_mat) || is.null(cell_type) || is.null(size)) {
    stop("raw_mat, cell_type, and size are required.")
  }
  
  raw_mat <- as.matrix(raw_mat)
  cell_type <- as.data.frame(cell_type, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (ncol(cell_type) < 2) stop("cell_type must have at least 2 columns: barcode, label.")
  colnames(cell_type)[1:2] <- c("barcode", "cell_type")
  
  if (is.null(colnames(raw_mat))) stop("raw_mat must have column names (cell barcodes).")
  if (is.null(rownames(raw_mat))) stop("raw_mat must have row names formatted like chr-start-end.")
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Normalize by library size
  # ----------------------------
  if (isTRUE(var.filter)) {
    vars <- apply(raw_mat, 1, var)
    keep <- vars < stats::quantile(vars, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
    cellsize <- colSums(raw_mat[keep, , drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    cellsize <- colSums(raw_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  cellsize[cellsize == 0] <- 1
  raw_mat <- sweep(raw_mat, 2, cellsize, "/")
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Prepare chromosome windows
  # ----------------------------
  size <- as.data.frame(size, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (!grepl("^chr", as.character(size[1, 1]))) {
    size[, 1] <- paste0("chr", size[, 1])
  }
  size <- size[size[, 1] %in% paste0("chr", 1:22), , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(size) == 0) stop("No autosomes found in size.")
  
  cnv_bin0 <- GenomicRanges::GRanges(size[, 1], IRanges::IRanges(1, as.numeric(size[, 2])))
  sw <- GenomicRanges::slidingWindows(x = cnv_bin0, width = window_w, step = window_step)
  cnv_bin <- sw@unlistData
  
  # Parse raw_mat row ranges once
  parts <- strsplit(rownames(raw_mat), ":|_|-")
  chr_vec <- vapply(parts, `[`, character(1), 1)
  st_vec  <- as.numeric(vapply(parts, `[`, character(1), 2)) + 1
  en_vec  <- as.numeric(vapply(parts, `[`, character(1), 3))
  
  subject <- GenomicRanges::GRanges(chr_vec, IRanges::IRanges(st_vec, en_vec))
  ov <- as.matrix(GenomicRanges::findOverlaps(cnv_bin, subject))
  if (nrow(ov) == 0) stop("No overlaps found between windows and raw_mat bins.")
  
  # ----------------------------
  # FAST smoothing via rowsum
  # ----------------------------
  # old version looped per window; this groups once and sums in C
  grp <- factor(ov[, 1], levels = seq_len(length(cnv_bin)))
  smooth_mat <- rowsum(raw_mat[ov[, 2], , drop = FALSE], group = grp, reorder = FALSE)
  smooth_mat <- as.matrix(smooth_mat)
  colnames(smooth_mat) <- colnames(raw_mat)
  rownames(smooth_mat) <- paste0(
    as.character(GenomicRanges::seqnames(cnv_bin)), "-",
    GenomicRanges::start(cnv_bin), "-",
    GenomicRanges::end(cnv_bin)
  )
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Align cell labels
  # ----------------------------
  rownames(cell_type) <- cell_type$barcode
  m_idx <- match(colnames(smooth_mat), rownames(cell_type))
  if (anyNA(m_idx)) {
    stop("Some raw_mat barcodes are missing from cell_type.")
  }
  mat_celltype <- cell_type$cell_type[m_idx]
  
  normal_idx <- which(mat_celltype %in% normal_lab)
  if (length(normal_idx) == 0) {
    stop("No normal cells matched normal_lab.")
  }
  
  nontumor_mat <- smooth_mat[, normal_idx, drop = FALSE]
  med <- matrixStats::rowMedians(nontumor_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  bin_ind <- which(is.finite(med) & med > 0)
  if (length(bin_ind) == 0) {
    stop("No informative bins after normal-cell median filtering.")
  }
  
  smooth_mat_norm <- sweep(
    smooth_mat[bin_ind, , drop = FALSE],
    1,
    med[bin_ind],
    "/"
  )
  smooth_mat_norm <- pmin(smooth_mat_norm, 5)
  plot_matrix <- t(smooth_mat_norm)
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Chromosome labels/gaps
  # ----------------------------
  rn <- rownames(smooth_mat)[bin_ind]
  chr_of_bin <- vapply(strsplit(rn, "-"), `[`, character(1), 1)
  chrgap <- table(chr_of_bin)[paste0("chr", 1:nrow(size))]
  chrgap[is.na(chrgap)] <- 0
  
  col_lab <- rep(" ", ncol(plot_matrix))
  nz <- which(chrgap != 0)
  if (length(nz) > 0) {
    pos <- c(0, cumsum(chrgap)[nz])[seq_along(nz)] + chrgap[nz] / 2
    col_lab[as.integer(pos)] <- names(chrgap)[nz]
  }
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Build annotation rows
  # ----------------------------
  ann_row <- data.frame(
    cell_type = cell_type$cell_type[match(rownames(plot_matrix), cell_type$barcode)],
    row.names = rownames(plot_matrix),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  if (!is.null(annotation_df)) {
    annotation_df <- as.data.frame(annotation_df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    extra <- annotation_df[match(rownames(plot_matrix), rownames(annotation_df)), , drop = FALSE]
    rownames(extra) <- rownames(plot_matrix)
    ann_row <- cbind(ann_row, extra)
  }
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Color scale
  # ----------------------------
  plot_matrix <- plot_matrix * 2
  mid_idx <- which(plot_matrix <= 2.5 & plot_matrix >= 1.5)
  plot_matrix[mid_idx] <- 2
  
  breaklength <- 50
  setcolor <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(breaklength)
  pminv <- min(plot_matrix, na.rm = TRUE)
  pmaxv <- max(plot_matrix, na.rm = TRUE)
  setbreaks <- c(
    seq(pminv, 1.7, length.out = ceiling(breaklength / 2) + 1),
    c(
      2.3,
      seq((pmaxv - 2.3) / breaklength + 2.3, pmaxv, length.out = floor(breaklength / 2))
    )[1:(breaklength / 2)]
  )
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Draw helper
  # ----------------------------
  draw_heatmap <- function() {
    args <- list(
      mat = plot_matrix,
      cluster_cols = FALSE,
      cluster_rows = TRUE,
      show_rownames = FALSE,
      show_colnames = TRUE,
      color = setcolor,
      breaks = setbreaks,
      labels_col = col_lab,
      clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
      clustering_method = "ward.D2",
      gaps_col = cumsum(chrgap),
      cutree_rows = nclust,
      annotation_row = ann_row
    )
    if (!is.null(annotation_colors)) args$annotation_colors <- annotation_colors
    do.call(pheatmap::pheatmap, args)
  }
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Display or save
  # ----------------------------
  tmp <- NULL
  if (isTRUE(display)) {
    tmp <- draw_heatmap()
  } else {
    if (is.null(plot_path)) {
      plot_path <- file.path("./plots", paste0("CNV_custom_w", window_w, "_s", window_step, ".png"))
    }
    dir.create(dirname(plot_path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
    
    ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(plot_path))
    if (!(ext %in% c("png", "pdf"))) {
      plot_path <- paste0(plot_path, ".png")
      ext <- "png"
    }
    
    if (ext == "pdf") {
      grDevices::pdf(plot_path, width = width / 100, height = height / 100)
    } else {
      grDevices::png(plot_path, width = width, height = height, res = res)
    }
    on.exit(grDevices::dev.off(), add = TRUE)
    
    tmp <- draw_heatmap()
    message("Plot saved: ", plot_path)
  }
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Return object
  # ----------------------------
  od <- tmp$tree_row$order
  clust <- stats::cutree(tmp$tree_row, k = nclust)
  clust_order <- clust[od]
  
  invisible(list(
    clust_order = clust_order,
    plot_matrix = plot_matrix,
    annotation_row = ann_row
  ))
}


# Example call for plot_scATAC_cnv_custom with tissue + Clusters_tile annotations

# 1) Build annotation_df aligned to filtered cells
# Read archr metadata (tissue 488B)
archr_meta <- read.table(
  "/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/archr_metadata.tsv",
  header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Normalize barcodes in archr_meta
archr_meta$barcode <- sub("^[^#]+#", "", rownames(archr_meta))
archr_meta$barcode <- sub("-1$", "", archr_meta$barcode)



# Build cell_type data frame: barcode | label
all_barcodes <- colnames(raw_counts)
cell_type_df <- data.frame(
  barcode   = all_barcodes,
  cell_type = ifelse(all_barcodes %in% barcode_normal_final, "normal", "tumor"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

heatmap_path <- file.path(dir_path, "plots", "step10_CNV_custom_annot.png")

# Remove zero-coverage cells before normalization (0/0 → NaN → rowMedians all NA)
keep_cells  <- colSums(raw_counts[, cell_type_df$barcode]) > 0
message(sprintf("  Cells passing coverage filter: %d / %d",
                sum(keep_cells), length(keep_cells)))
cell_type_df_filt <- cell_type_df[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]


keep_cells  <- colSums(raw_counts[, cell_type_df$barcode]) > 0
message(sprintf("  Cells passing coverage filter: %d / %d",
                sum(keep_cells), length(keep_cells)))
cell_type_df_filt <- cell_type_df[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]


# Get cells from filtered dataframe
cells_488B <- cell_type_df_filt$barcode

# Combine all cells from both sources
bc_489 = c('ewjkhfw')
cells <- unique(c(cells_488B, bc_489))

# Match for archr_meta lookup
idx <- match(cells, archr_meta$barcode)

# Create annotation dataframe
annot_df <- data.frame(
  tissue = ifelse(cells %in% bc_489, "Tiss_489", 
                  ifelse(!is.na(idx), archr_meta$tissue[idx], "unknown")),
  Clusters_tile = ifelse(cells %in% bc_489, "no", 
                         ifelse(!is.na(idx), archr_meta$Clusters_tile[idx], "no")),
  row.names = cells,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Summary
table(annot_df$tissue)

annot_df2 = merge(annot_df, cell_type_df_filt, by.x = 'row.names', by.y = 'barcode', all.x = T )
annot_df3 = annot_df2[annot_df2$tissue %in% c('Tiss_488B'),]
rownames(annot_df3) <- annot_df3$Row.names


# 2) Define annotation colors
annotation_colors <- list(
  tissue = c(
    Tiss_488B = "#E64B35",
    # Tiss_489  = "#4DBBD5",
    unknown   = "#BDBDBD"
  ),
  Clusters_tile = c(
    C1 = "#3B75AF",
    C2 = "#4FA26E",
    C3 = "yellow",
    C4 = "pink",
    no = "#D9D9D9"
  )
)

# 3A) Save to file
# Keep only barcodes that exist in annot_df2
keep_cols <- c("cell", colnames(raw_counts)[-1][colnames(raw_counts)[-1] %in% annot_df3$Row.names])
raw_counts_subset <- raw_counts[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]

cat("Subset raw_counts to:", ncol(raw_counts_subset) - 1, "cells\n")



cov_obj <- plot_scATAC_cnv_custom(
  raw_mat = as.matrix(raw_counts_subset)[,-1], #drop 1st column 
  cell_type = annot_df3[annot_df3$Row.names %in% colnames(raw_counts_subset)[-1], c("Row.names", "cell_type"), drop = FALSE],
  size = size_df,
  window_w = 10000000,
  window_step = 2000000,
  plot_path = file.path(dir_path, "plots", "step10_CNV_custom_annot.png"),
  display = FALSE,
  width = 1400,
  height = 700,
  nclust = 3,
  var.filter = FALSE,
  annotation_df = annot_df3[,c('Clusters_tile'),  drop = FALSE],
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors
)


```



#2. Making the scatterplots for each chr to observe CN-LOH

```{r}
cell_type=readRDS('data-raw/SU008/scATAC/cell_type_from_peaks.rds')
Obj_filtered=Genotype(Obj_filtered = Obj_filtered, cell_type=cell_type, xmax=3)
```





```{r}
tmp=Select_normal(Obj_filtered = Obj_filtered, raw_counts=raw_counts, plot_theta = TRUE, cell_type = cell_type, mincell = 0)
rm(tmp)
```






```{r}

a = read.csv('/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/tissue_barcodes/deepseq_489.barcodes.tsv', header = F)
b = read.csv('/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/tissue_barcodes/deepseq_488B.barcodes.tsv', header = F)

intersect(a$V1, b$V1)

```
